meta.title: About · EFU | Elite Fight Universe
meta.description: Meet Elite Fight Universe (EFU): the EFU Reality talent show, the EFU Fight Night gala series, and the EFU TV digital platform. Built on its own rule set, with a 10M HUF grand prize and a real pro career path.

hero.title: What is EFU?
hero.intro: Elite Fight Universe (EFU) is a martial arts and entertainment ecosystem built around an in-house competition system: combat sports events, talent-show formats, and digital broadcasts. EFU exists to create a new kind of stage for fighters — one where fans follow not just the matches but the athletes' full journey.

pillars.title: A full universe, on three pillars
pillars.intro: EFU rests on three main pillars: Reality, Fight Night and EFU TV.
pillars.realityDesc: A multi-week competition and talent-show format. Contestants prove themselves through tasks, challenges and fights while viewers get a behind-the-scenes look at their personalities, training and daily lives. EFU Reality's goal is to discover new talent, build characters and introduce the fighters of tomorrow.
pillars.fightNightDesc: EFU Fight Night is EFU's official gala series. This is where the organisation's headline bouts, ranking fights and title clashes take place. Fight Night events give amateur, semi-pro and pro athletes the same stage to prove themselves.
pillars.tvDesc: EFU TV is the digital home of Elite Fight Universe. Live broadcasts, reality episodes, galas, interviews, behind-the-scenes content and exclusive programming all live here.

ruleset.title: EFU Ruleset
ruleset.intro: EFU's own rule book puts continuous action and spectacular fights first.
hybridPoints: Combination of striking and ground fighting

mission.title: A community that connects
mission.body: EFU's mission is to build a Central-European martial-arts community that connects fighters, fans and partners — and to push the relationship between combat sports and digital entertainment to a new level.

timeline.title: How does an EFU career unfold?
timeline.intro: EFU offers a three-step career path: you surface on Reality, you prove yourself at Fight Night, and on the pro rankings your story can come full circle.
timeline.step1Desc: A multi-week format where contestants prove themselves through tasks, challenges and bouts.
timeline.step2Desc: The best of Reality face off at EFU's official gala series — across amateur, semi-pro and pro divisions.
timeline.step3Desc: The growing EFU ranking and title system opens the door to an international pro career.
